creator: sada@rr.iij4u.or.jp
text:
This is sada from Nagoya.

>>  * 	I'll import this port by myself in few days,

Certainly, please do it.
Thanks too > billf

>> By the way, can netscape45-* be removed after you commit these?

Hm, if netscape46-* are treated as just upgrade of netscape45-*,
who should be a maintainer of them ?
